seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Trafalgar and Trafalgar South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Trafalgar vs Trafalgar South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Trafalgar and Trafalgar South.
heading: Trafalgar vs Trafalgar South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Trafalgar, Victoria and Trafalgar South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Trafalgar South has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Trafalgar (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Trafalgar or Trafalgar South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Trafalgar has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Trafalgar South scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Trafalgar scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Trafalgar South scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Trafalgar or Trafalgar South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Trafalgar South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
